news.headline: ZEX token skyrockets as Zeta Markets' airdrop exceeds expectations, doubling in value on Thursday.
news.summary: On Thursday, the value of Zeta Markets' token saw a significant increase, doubling in value. This unexpected surge surpassed pre-market predictions for the Solana perpetuals DEX airdrop.

news.headline: 75 participants borrow $531.692 billion from Federal Reserve through Reverse Repo Operation.
Bridge Bank provides $47M term loan to support Divergent Technologies' growth in Torrance, CA.
news.summary: Today, Bridge Bank's Technology Banking Group finalized a $47 million term loan with Divergent Technologies Inc., based in Torrance, California. The loan aims to facilitate Divergent's expansion efforts. Divergent specializes in utilizing data-driven methods to develop and construct vehicle frameworks through their innovative Divergent Adaptive Production System (DAPS™). DAPS™ is recognized as the inaugural complete software-hardware production system globally, catering to industrial digital manufacturing needs within the automotive, aerospace, and defense sectors.

news.headline: Ampersand Capital Partners named top PE fund manager in Americas by Preqin for second year, a feat announced on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In the latest report released on June 27, 2024, Ampersand Capital Partners ("Ampersand") from Wellesley, Massachusetts, has secured the top position for the second year in a row as the leading Private Equity Fund Manager in the Americas for private capital performance. The rankings were provided by Preqin, a reputable organization in the industry. This recognition highlights Ampersand's successful track record in managing private equity funds in the region. The announcement was made as part of the annual awards, showcasing top performers in the sector.

news.headline: Washington Poison Center hires James Leonard, PharmD, DABAT as new Managing Director.Characters: 87
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, the Washington Poison Center (WAPC), a nonprofit organization in Washington offering free medical guidance on medication errors, poisonings, and drug overdoses, welcomed James Leonard, PharmD, DABAT as its new Managing Director. Dr. Leonard brings expertise in the field to lead the center in its mission.

news.headline: Automotive industry set to reach 104 million units by 2030, with a CAGR of 2.4% from 88 million units in 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago on June 27, 2024, PRNewswire reported that the Automotive Industry, including PV, LCV, and MHCV segments, is anticipated to increase from 88 million units in 2024, reaching an estimated 104 million units by 2030. This growth is projected to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 2.4%. These findings are based on a recent report by MarketsandMarkets.

news.headline: Idaho emergency abortions permitted by Supreme Court temporarily.#SCOTUS #Idaho #abortion
Zevo partners with MLS and Landon Donovan to offer up to 8 hours of bug protection, their official bug spray.
news.summary: CINCINNATI - Zevo On-Body is thrilled to announce its partnership with Major League Soccer (MLS), marking the League’s inaugural bug spray collaboration. Offering up to eight hours of scent-free, non-greasy defense against mosquitoes and ticks, Zevo stands out as the top choice. Partnering with renowned soccer figure Landon Donovan, the brand emphasizes the importance of MVP-worthy protection. Donovan, a US soccer icon and MLS star, brings firsthand experience to the partnership, underscoring their shared mission.

news.headline: MCWT's Reignite! program in Michigan helps women return to workforce & transition into tech careers. Applications open for 2024.
news.summary: Southfield, Michigan - On June 26, 2024, the Michigan Council of Women in Technology (MCWT) Foundation launched applications for the 2024 Reignite! program. The program targets women re-entering the workforce and shifting towards tech careers. This effort aims to provide necessary support and guidance for women looking to transition into the tech industry.

news.headline: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Texas and Baylor Scott & White Health extend contracts to Oct. 1, 2024, three-month extension.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, a recent agreement has been reached between Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Texas and Baylor Scott & White Health to prolong their provider and facility contracts until October 1, 2024. This three-month extension will allow Baylor Scott & White providers to continue offering services through this collaboration.

news.headline: Talen Energy responds to Exelon/AEP objection to Susquehanna ISA due to changing demand for power.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Talen Energy Corporation (OTCQX: TLNE) based in Houston released a statement highlighting the significant impact of artificial intelligence and data centers on the power sector. The company noted that these advancements have led to a shift in power demand, marking a crucial turning point for the industry. The statement emphasizes the transformative nature of AI and data centers, underscoring the need for the sector to adapt to these changes.

news.headline: June 2024 Quarterly Bulletin by HKMA highlights latest in banking sector for Hong Kong. More details coming soon.
news.summary: The Quarterly Bulletin for June 2024 has been released by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), highlighting the latest updates in the banking sector. This report provides insights into the significant happenings within the industry during the stated period.

news.headline: Advisor of Bioxytran publishes book on hyperbaric oxygenation for stroke & Alzheimer’s patients.
Century Communities is now selling townhomes and single-family homes in Hickory, NC at Trivium, with some of the largest homebuilders in the nation, including online sales leader Century Complete.
news.summary: A prominent online homebuying innovator, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), is introducing townhomes and single-family homes at Trivium in Charlotte, North Carolina. Known for being one of the largest homebuilders nationwide and excelling in online home sales, the company stands out as the top-ranked homebuilder. The launch of these properties signifies a significant opportunity for homebuyers looking for modern living spaces in a desirable location.

news.headline: Elite Rewards raises funds in 11th annual Furniture Mart USA Charity Golf Classic for Emily's Hope, The Promising Futures Fund, and The Rising Star Foundation.
news.summary: The 11th annual Furniture Mart USA Charity Golf Classic at the Grand Falls Casino & Golf Resort in Sioux Falls, South Dakota on June 27, 2024, raised funds for Emily's Hope, The Promising Futures Fund, and The Rising Star Foundation. Elite Rewards took part in the tournament to support these causes.

news.headline: Texas Recovery Centers hosts resource fair for drug and alcohol addiction, celebrates equine resident Journey's 4th birthday.
news.summary: In a recent event held on June 19, 2024, Texas Recovery Centers in SCURRY organized a birthday celebration for Journey, the youngest equine resident in their facility. The event, known as the Birthday Resource Bash & Fair, aimed to provide valuable aftercare resources for patients. Journey turned four years old during the celebration, highlighting the importance of offering support and resources for individuals in recovery.

news.headline: Voice actor Masakazu Morita shares thoughts on Bleach: Brave Souls reaching 9th anniversary, coming to Xbox, and later Nintendo Switch.
news.summary: Tokyo-based company KLab Inc., known for its popular online mobile games, revealed that Bleach: Brave Souls, a successful 3D action game, is now accessible on Xbox consoles starting from today, June 27. The Nintendo Switch launch is set for a future date. This game by KLab Inc. garnered significant attention and now Xbox users can enjoy it as well, marking a new milestone in its availability to a wider gaming audience.

news.headline: Police in California seize suspected stolen goods, meant for Amazon, in a recent bust.
Young adults facing financial challenges are becoming better savers, says a report. The Generation Z cohort prioritizes saving over spending.
news.summary: Last week, the record-breaking temperature of 108 degrees was reported in a city in Southern California. This marked the highest temperature ever recorded in that area, surpassing the previous record of 105 degrees set in 2015. The extreme heat led to an increased demand for electricity, with the power grid struggling to meet the demand. As a result, approximately 10,000 residents experienced power outages lasting several hours. Local authorities issued warnings urging residents to conserve energy and stay hydrated to avoid heat-related illnesses. Despite efforts to restore power swiftly, some residents were without electricity for an extended period as crews worked to repair damaged equipment. The incident highlighted the challenges of coping with extreme weather conditions and the importance of being prepared for such events.

news.headline: Broomfield franchisee Chris Schatz recognized with PuroClean's On the Move Award for success and contributions.
news.summary: At the recent annual convention in Broomfield, Colorado on June 27, 2024, Chris Schatz was honored by the Paramedics of Property Damage for his ongoing success and valuable contributions to the PuroClean franchise. PuroClean, a top property restoration and remediation franchise in the country, recognized Schatz for his outstanding achievements. This event highlighted Schatz's dedication to the company and his significant impact on its operations. The convention brought together industry experts and key figures, emphasizing the importance of individuals like Schatz in driving the success of PuroClean.

news.headline: Yard Force debuts cutting-edge innovations at Spoga Gafa 2024 in Cologne, Germany. Showcased from June 24-26, 2024.
news.summary: Yard Force recently showcased its innovative garden tools and robotic mowers at Spoga Gafa 2024 in Cologne, Germany from June 24-26. The event highlighted Yard Force's dedication to cutting-edge garden care technology. The star of the show was the iVR10 robotic mower, which introduces revolutionary features for lawn care. This model boasts a virtual boundary system, setting it apart in the market. The event was a success in showcasing Yard Force's commitment to innovation and excellence.

news.headline: Walgreens to close undisclosed number of stores due to "headwinds". Parent company WBA has approximately 8,700 stores.
news.summary: Walgreens, a pharmacy chain, is expected to close a “significant” number of stores due to challenges faced. The parent company, Walgreen Boots Alliance, Inc. (NASDAQ:WBA), revealed plans to shut down an undisclosed amount of its approximately 8,700 stores during the release of third-quarter earnings. The Deerfield, Illinois-based retailer stated it is in the process of finalizing a major multiyear program to optimize its footprint by closing certain underperforming stores in the U.S. as part of a strategic review. Specific details regarding the number of closures were not specified.

news.headline: Implied volatility surging for Apollo Commercial Finance with highest IV in options market today. Market expects big move.
news.summary: Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc. investors trading under the symbol ARI must monitor the stock closely due to recent activity in the options market. Specifically, the July 19, 2024 $2.50 Put option has displayed one of the highest levels of implied volatility across equity options today. Implied volatility indicates the extent of future market movement anticipated. High levels of implied volatility in options imply that investors foresee a significant directional shift in the underlying stocks. This information can be crucial for investors to consider when making trading decisions.

news.headline: Los Angeles Auto Show & AutoMobility LA hire new CMO, Dan Sampson, for 2024 show. Key addition to exec team.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, ANSA Productions, which owns and operates the Los Angeles Auto Show® and AutoMobility LA™, welcomed Dan Sampson as the new Chief Marketing Officer. This addition to the executive team highlights the company's commitment to strategic leadership.

news.headline: Auction for US 7-year notes held with strong demand, yield at 1.52% and bid-to-cover ratio of 2.35.
AKAM announces new residential intelligence business philosophy, optimizing operations after 40 years in the industry.
news.summary: A well-established property management company with roots in New York and Florida strengthens its leadership team and enhances operations to increase value through new offerings. After four decades of successful operation, AKAM is positioned for growth moving forward in 2024.

news.headline: Neeru Arora appointed as North American Senior VP, CIO of Mazda. 3 decades of experience. Date: June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on June 27, 2024, Mazda North American Operations (MNAO) revealed the appointment of Neeru Arora as a pivotal figure to steer innovation and define the organization's digital direction. Arora brings a formidable track record of more than thirty years in leadership roles, positioning her as a key driver in shaping MNAO's future endeavors.

news.headline: Las Vegas Sands donates $270,000 to LGBTQ+ Center of Southern Nevada, funding capacity-building initiatives.
news.summary: Las Vegas Sands has announced a new round of Sands Cares funding aimed at supporting the physical expansion and organizational development of a nonprofit through the Sands Cares Accelerator. This initiative, initiated in June 27, 2024, includes a significant contribution from Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS) to provide resources for the nonprofit's growth. The funding will assist in the nonprofit's expansion efforts and help bolster its organizational development work in the Sands Cares Accelerator program. The contribution from Las Vegas Sands underscores its commitment to supporting nonprofit organizations and fostering their development, reflecting its dedication to making a positive impact on the community.

news.headline: Traveling with marijuana could have serious legal consequences based on location. Attitudes towards cannabis are changing.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Wichita, Kansas, it was highlighted that carrying marijuana while traveling, either within the country or abroad, can carry significant legal repercussions determined by the location and laws of the destinations involved. The stance on cannabis is undergoing changes, and individuals should be cautious about the laws in the regions they are traveling through or to, to avoid potential legal consequences.

news.headline: Global process oil market to reach $5.6 billion by 2029. Various types and functions analyzed.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Chicago, a new report was released on the Process Oil Market. The report categorizes process oils based on type, including Aromatic, Paraffinic, Naphthenic, and Non-carcinogenic, and their functions such as Extender Oil, Plasticizer, Solvent, and Defoamer. The production technologies considered are Convention Route, Gas to Liquid, and Bio-based. The report delves into various applications and regional markets worldwide.

news.headline: Bazooka Tango released Shardbound to public, its immersive card game, on Epic Games Store after successful playtest.
news.summary: For the very first time, gamers across the globe now have the opportunity to experience the immersive collectible card game, Shardbound, through the Epic Games Store. This captivating game, developed in partnership with Immutable Games, offers a distinctive mix of tabletop and digital card game features, along with compelling gameplay that has garnered attention from audiences. This exciting release marks a significant milestone in the gaming world, inviting players to engage in the virtual realm of Shardbound through a platform that has gained immense popularity.

news.headline: 62% of businesses using live AI translation for inclusivity, 96% reporting higher ROI than human solutions.
news.summary: A recent study found that a considerable 62% of companies have employed live AI translation to boost inclusivity and engagement, with an impressive 96% stating that AI offers better return on investment compared to human alternatives. The research was conducted by Wordly, a prominent company offering live AI translation and caption services. The study sheds light on the increasing adoption of AI technology in business operations, emphasizing its effectiveness in promoting diversity and enhancing interaction.

news.headline: DLHC stock soars 9.8% to $10.76 on high volume, 11.3% loss last four weeks, due to revenue growth and upcoming $0.14 EPS.
news.summary: Shares of DLH Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: DLHC) surged by 9.8% on the last trading day, closing at $10.76. This increase was driven by significant trading volume, surpassing the usual levels. This rise contrasts with the stock's recent 11.3% decline over the past four weeks. The company is experiencing revenue growth due to expansions in its health and Enterprise IT Management divisions.Analysts predict that in its forthcoming report, DLH Holdings Corp. will report quarterly earnings of $0.14 per share.

news.headline: 7-year high yield in the US hits 4.276%, down from a previous 4.650%.
US 7-year bond bid-to-cover ratio beats forecast at 2.58, up from previous 2.43.
VGP NV introduces new facilities for Verne in VGP Park Zagreb, enhancing operational capacity and services.
Nokia Corporation reports changes in own shares on June 27, 2024, at 20:00 EEST.
news.summary: Nokia Corporation made an announcement on the Stock Exchange on 27 June 2024 at 20:00 EEST regarding modifications in its own shares.

news.headline: Riskified introduces new AI solutions at Ascend 2024, focusing on fraud management for ecommerce merchants. #Innovation
news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York, Riskified's event Ascend 2024 introduced new AI-driven tools to combat fraud and highlighted success stories from top merchants. The event showcased innovative strategies to tackle fraud and boost growth, with a focus on leveraging artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: Ayurcann merges with Arogo Capital, creating enterprise value of US $210 million, specializing in cannabis products.
news.summary: A Canadian cannabis extraction company called Ayurcann has received recognition for its work in processing and manufacturing cannabis 2.0 and 3.0 products.

news.headline: N1 Managing Director retires, Festi CEO to temporarily take over until replacement found.Ásta S. Fjeldsted will act as N1's MD.
news.summary: Festi and Ýmir Örn Finnbogason have come to terms on his retirement as Managing Director of N1, effective immediately, also exiting Festi's Executive Management. Ýmir Örn held the position at N1 from June 2023. Ásta S. Fjeldsted, Festi's CEO, will serve as the interim Managing Director of N1 until a successor is appointed, with the role set to be publicized in upcoming weeks.

news.headline: 7-year Treasury yield hits 4.279% prior to $44 billion auction.
Young children aged 5-12 experience more concussions outside of sports, leading to worse symptoms and delays in specialist care - CHOP study.
news.summary: A recent study by researchers at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia revealed that children aged 5 to 12 are at a higher risk of facing severe symptoms and encountering delays in receiving specialized medical care when injured during recreational or non-sport activities. The study, conducted in Philadelphia, highlighted the importance of prompt and appropriate care for children within this age group. The findings serve as a reminder for parents and caregivers to remain vigilant during recreational activities, as young children are particularly vulnerable to these types of injuries. This study underscores the significance of raising awareness about the potential risks associated with recreational activities and the need for timely access to specialized medical treatment for children.

news.headline: Global drone market to reach $166.70B by 2031 from $22.4B in 2022; CAGR of 25% (2024-2031) - SkyQuest Technology.
news.summary: In June 27, 2024, based on data from SkyQuest, the worldwide drone market had a value of $22.4 billion in 2022. It is projected to increase from $28 billion in 2023 to an estimated $166.70 billion by 2031, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 25% between 2024 and 2031.

news.headline: Event in NYC showcasing Chilean Pisco by Pisco Chile and ProChile. Celebrating Chile's culture and spirits with rich flavors on June 26.
news.summary: On June 26th, 2024, in New York City, a celebration of Chilean culture and spirits took place at the "Discover Chilean Pisco Trade Event." The event, hosted by Pisco Chile and ProChile, showcased the nation's renowned spirits and culture. New York City, known as a trendsetter in cocktails, served as the perfect backdrop for this event. The celebration attracted a large audience and highlighted the growing popularity of Chilean Pisco. Attendees were able to sample a variety of Pisco brands and learn more about Chilean culture. This event marked a successful collaboration between Pisco Chile, ProChile, and the vibrant city of New York.

news.headline: New update: WJXT Channel 4 features duos. #news #update #WJXT #Channel4
news.summary: According to recent data, there has been a sharp increase in unemployment rates, with the number of individuals currently out of work rising to over 10 million. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant drop, with the main index falling by 5% in just one day. This has led to growing concerns about the state of the economy and the impact of these trends on both businesses and individuals. Experts are closely monitoring the situation and providing guidance on ways to navigate these challenging times.

news.headline: Premier American Uranium acquires American Future Fuel, completing purchase of all AMPS shares.
news.summary: Premier American Uranium Inc. ("PUR" or "Premier American Uranium") has officially completed the acquisition of all AMPS Shares from American Future Fuel Corporation. The arrangement, announced on June 27, 2024, saw PUR acquire the entire issued and outstanding common shares of AMPS. PUR is listed on the TSXV (TSXV: PUR) and OTCQB (OTCQB: PAUIF), while AMPS is listed on the CSE (CSE: AMPS), OTCQB (OTCQB: AFFCF), FWB (FWB: K14), and WKN (WKN: A3DQFB) exchanges.

news.headline: Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) declares C$0.01167 dividend per share for July 2024, 52nd dividend, payable on July 18th.
news.summary: Montreal-based company Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) has declared a monthly dividend payment for July 2024 of C$0.01167 per common share, to be paid on July 18, 2024. Shareholders of record as of July 10, 2024, will be eligible for this fifty-second (52nd) dividend and forty-second (42nd) monthly dividend payment. This qualifies as an "eligible dividend" for tax purposes.

news.headline: Cameco releases 2023 Sustainability Report highlighting progress towards clean-air vision and climate change fight.
news.summary: SASKATOON, Saskatchewan--Cameco (TSX: CCO; NYSE: CCJ) unveiled its 2023 Sustainability Report, highlighting the company's sustainability efforts and progress. The report outlines key metrics demonstrating Cameco’s commitment to advancing sustainability initiatives. CEO stated, “Our goal is to support a clean-air planet and contribute to the global decarbonization effort. We are proud of our achievements in this area.”The report showcases Cameco's dedication to sustainability and its role in combating climate change.

news.headline: Hometap closes $217M securitization (HTAP 2024-1) backed by HEI assets, oversubscribed and showcases investors' interest.
news.summary: Boston-based fintech company Hometap has successfully closed its first securitization, HTAP 2024-1, backed by home equity investment assets (HEI). The transaction, which saw strong demand, was oversubscribed, highlighting the increasing institutional interest in the HEI asset class and confidence in Hometap's brand. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to provide debt-free home equity financing for American homeowners.

news.headline: Federal Energy Regulatory Commission approves Venture Global's CP2 LNG as the company's third export facility.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on June 27, 2024, Venture Global released a statement regarding the approval of their third export facility, CP2 LNG, by the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC). The company expressed gratitude towards the Commission and FERC staff for their support. This marks a significant milestone for Venture Global as they continue to expand their LNG export operations.
